description: Perform a Dark Object Subtraction (DOS) atmospheric correction on the Landsat image located at /home/ga/snap_data/landsat_multispectral.tif. Identify the dark object constants for band_3 (Red) and band_4 (Green). Create two new bands named 'Red_Corrected' and 'Green_Corrected' by subtracting the respective constants from the original bands and clamping the output to zero to prevent negative values. Save the resulting product to /home/ga/snap_exports/landsat_dos_corrected.dim and export it as a GeoTIFF to /home/ga/snap_exports/landsat_dos_corrected.tif.
